human_verification.notes: Reviewed issue #1359 requirements, franchise-development boundary discipline, FTC/NASAA/DFPI source quality, scenario coverage, functionality coverage, and validated spec-pack completeness.

review_notes: All required scenario families for the issue and cross-industry research contract are covered and mapped to passing results.

specialist_owned_evidence: Boundary controls restrict the lane to franchise-development administration, including candidate status, FDD and receipt tracking, filing-state readiness, seller and broker coordination, and escalation packaging without legal or approval drift.

Authority sources cover FTC disclosure timing and Item 19 limits, NASAA filing and multi-unit workflow expectations, questionnaire and acknowledgment controls, and California filing-state completeness rules with refresh and decay metadata.
Scenario set covers missing industry evidence, unsupported workaround requests, repeat failure, multi-unit structure escalation, conflicting policies, and tenant fact gaps.
Runtime remains specification-based with explicit promotion requirements for any later retained-implementation transition.
notes: No blocking unresolved ambiguity remains; filing-state differences and tenant approval thresholds are explicitly handled through runtime retrieval and escalation rules.
This package is ready for validated operations under specification-based execution controls.
